about: {#strong}Full Stack Web Developer{/strong} based in {#strong}Brazil{/strong}, specializing in interactive, accessible and performant web applications.

larafy.description:
- Development of a tailored task management platform for the accounting industry using {#strong}TypeScript{/strong}, {#strong}React.js{/strong}, {#strong}TanStack Start{/strong}, {#strong}Tailwind CSS{/strong} and {#strong}MySQL{/strong};
- Development of accounting task automations using {#strong}Python{/strong} and {#strong}Playwright{/strong}.

personal_vestibulares.description:
- Development of a platform geared toward teachers and students using {#strong}TypeScript{/strong}, {#strong}React.js{/strong}, {#strong}Tailwind CSS{/strong}, {#strong}Firebase{/strong} and {#strong}Stripe{/strong};
- Responsible for migrating the codebase from {#strong}JavaScript{/strong} to {#strong}TypeScript{/strong}.
